channel.title: git on Computer Science Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in git on Computer Science Tech Blog

item.title: Github Clone Ssl Connection Error Centos6
item.description: Issue git clone SSL connect error (NSS error -12190) git fatal: HTTP request failed git clone https://github.com/vim/vim.git Initialized empty Git repository in /root/vim/.git/ error: while accessing https://github.com/vim/vim.git/info/refs fatal: HTTP request failed git fatl: unable to access : SSL connect error GIT_CURL_VERBOSE=1 git clone https://github.com/fshilver/settings.git Cloning into 'settings'... * Couldn't find host github.com in the .netrc file; using defaults * About to connect() to github.com port 443 (#0) * Trying 192.

item.title: Git Tag Cheetsheet
item.description: add tag # add tag to latest commit ~$ git tag v1.5.1.2 # add tag to specific commit ~$ git tag v1.5.1.2 446e2c10555ccbaa5cd4006b250d7d2135dbc2b0 remove tag # local ~$ git tag -d 1.7.2 # remote ~$ git push origin :tags/1.7.2 overwrite tag # local ~$ git tag -f 1.8.0 ~$ git tag -f 1.8.0 <commit id> # remote ~$ git push -f --tags push tag to origin # push specific tag # git push <remote name> <tag> ~$ git push origin 1.

item.title: Git Submodule Cheetsheet
item.description: Installation # check submodule ~$ git submodule # add submodule ~$ git submodule add <remote repository> <local dir> ## submodule download ~$ git submodule init ~$ git submodule update Update # before git 1.8 ~$ cd project # git repository ~$ cd sub1 # assume sub1 is submodule ~$ git pull # get latest sub1 ~$ cd .. ~$ git add sub1 ~$ git commit -m 'update submodule' # after git 1.
